description: Get your gamers ready to party with our Video Game Controller Pinata! This controller shaped pinata measures 50 x 41 centimetres, and is sure to add an awesome touch to your video game birthday party. Just fill it with up to 900 grammes of your own sweets and small party favours. Then, hang it from a tree branch or another secure spot outside, and have kids take turns swinging a bat to break it open. Just make sure everyone plays safely!
